curation_notes: Patch modifies only pxr/usd/sdf/crateData.cpp (plus test files and CMakeLists.txt). The fix adds validation of primChildren entries during crate file loading in _PopulateFromCrateFile, checking for invalid identifiers, nonexistent child paths, and duplicate entries. Without this validation, a crafted .usdc file with malformed primChildren can trigger a use-after-free when those children are accessed. Pre-assigned class use-after-free matches CWE-416 and the advisory description.
